Patch Set 9:

Hey Mike, can you review this patch please?

Patch Set 9:

The changes posted look good Alexis. If the intent is to align on OOM chart structure, can I ask if you intend to add resource limits and move to using the shared Maria-galera db?

Patch Set 9: Code-Review+1

Ok, the main goal in that case is to fix controller-blueprints, as it’s currently failing. I can have a follow-up patch for what you asked for. I would have to dig a little bit, though, as I don’t know what are the mariadb creds
